Name: EVE 50PL 21700 5000mAh 50A Battery
Purpose: This'll power the drone through its flight. I decided to buy Li-ion batteries and manually connect 3 to make a 3S cell to make a 5000mAh 3S battery pack. This'll help the drone fly longer. I'm buying one extra just in case.

Name: JLCPCB Order + Shipping
Purpose: I'll be manufacturing my custom PCB from JLCPCB.

Name: Male & Female Headers
Purpose: It'll be used to connect things on the PCB.

Name: XT90 Male to XT60 Female connector for battery
Purpose: This converts the XT90 on the battery to XT60 so it can be connected to the PCB.

Name: Drone Frame
Purpose: This will be the frame that I will be doing all the testing on. I'll have to ship it to my location.

Name: 1400KV Brushless Motors
Purpose: These will be the motors that generate lift for the drone.

Name: Raspberry PI 4 4GB
Purpose: This will be used to connect the usb camera and for video transmission. I already have this, so I will not need to buy it.

Name: Arduino Nano
Purpose: This will be running the flight software and controlling the motors. I already have this, so I will not need to buy it.

Name: GY-91 Board with both MPU-9250 & BMP180
Purpose: This will the the 9 Axis Flight Controller for the drone (Gyroscope, Accelerometer, Magnetometer, Altometer)

Name: 8x4.5 Inch RC Drone Propellers
Purpose: These will be used on the brushless motors to provide lift for the drone. I am buying 8 pieces instead of 4 in case some breaks during testing.

Name: 3S Li-po Battery Charger US Plug
Purpose: This will be used to charge the battery for the drone.

Name: MicroZone MC6C Mini V2 2.4G 6CH Controller Transmitter w/ Receiver
Purpose: This will be used for the radio communication with the drone.

Name: 30A Brushless Motor ESC
Purpose: This will be the Electronic Speed Controller for the 4 brushless motors on the drone. I need to buy 2 pieces for a total of 4 for each motor.

Name: 12V-5V Buck Converter
Purpose: This'll convert the 11.1V from the 21700 battery pack to 5V so the Raspberry PI can use it.
